title: Technical Guide 1: Sub-system Cloud Connector integration
text: This document describes the best practices for handling Cloud Connector and API in an enterprise environment. It covers deployment steps, security configurations like TLS, authentication tokens, and common troubleshooting patterns. When scaling Cloud Connector, consider memory limits and API rate limits. For API, refer to the main architecture diagram.

It covers deployment steps, security configurations like TLS, authentication tokens, and common troubleshooting patterns. When scaling Agents, consider memory limits and API rate limits. For Kubernetes, refer to the main architecture diagram.
